name: Bisalloy Steel Group Limited
analysis: BIS has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$4.5700, stop A$4.2768, target A$5.0600 (1.67:1) — then trail it.
